known_mismatches: DART renders its own float64 scene reconstructions under DART collision/scene contracts, not outputs from the authors' public Warp/Newton reference implementation or historical paper rendering setup.
Only the DART exact-FBF row is captured; faithful synchronized external-solver renderings and approved source goldens remain separate evidence.
This is explicitly a Painleve-style proxy: the paper does not publish the box dimensions, mass, launch state, or absolute timestamps.
The source uses a three-solver semantic edit; this artifact is the underlying DART proxy only.
